hero.title: Premium events crafted with calm precision.
hero.description: A focused studio for builders and operators who want thoughtful gatherings, practical conversations, and fewer empty trends.

events.title: Curated gatherings for builders who prefer depth over noise.
events.description: A focused calendar of experiences designed to be useful, human, and high-signal. Sign up to receive first access and limited-capacity invitations.

items.title: Desert Product Salon
items.description: An intimate evening on product craft, creative discipline, and building with intention.

items.title: Studio Systems Workshop
items.description: A tactical workshop on setting up repeatable systems for design, content, and execution.

items.title: Founders on the Coast
items.description: A small-format strategic conversation for builders shipping ambitious ideas with clarity.

signup.title: Join the priority event list.
signup.description: No fluff, no spam. You will only receive event invitations, schedule updates, and limited-seat announcements.

footer.tagline: Studio-standard digital experiences with a calm, premium point of view.
